issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (DON!! cards attached to this card), not 'HasRestingDon' (resting DON!! cards). Card text says 'you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field' which means total DON!! on the field, not attached to a specific card. However, the most accurate interpretation for cost is 'HasAttachedDon' in the context of a card's own resources. If this should count all DON!! on field, the condition type is not in the standard set and requires clarification. Assuming the intent is attached DON!!, use 'HasAttachedDon'.

Target scope is incomplete. Should specify that the chosen character must be restable (not already resting). Target should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with additional constraint for unresting characters or clarify the max selection is 'up to 1'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less.
